title: Weskerson's Torches
description: Give your Torches some much needed TLC with this revamp. Overhauls the torch textures while adding an animated fire and unique glow!
body:
![Affiliate Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43493b07d4ff7c00ecdef4c91c9ba95bc0ceb940_0.webp)

![WT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/753f0347f7aad2aa1b7999b40b3125b7068fac75.png)
![additional information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30de559cc559e30922eaec6c907daf48349322d1.png)
Additional Information: - This pack requires versions 1.21.4 and above to work properly - In order to utilize this pack to the fullest, I highly recommend using [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) to get features such as eating animations for third person, proper lantern holding, etc. - This pack is also compatible with the mod [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) which is highly recommended if you want additional hand-viewing with some cool animations to go along with it! Check out this video that showcases a bit of the compatibility! - In order to enjoy this pack in versions 1.21.4 and 5, you MUST install [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)
_____________________________________________________________
![terms of use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e49dca975d7080125a17335fd8ebfbca4293e487.png)
